name: smb-sales-intelligence-mcp
title: SMB Sales Intelligence MCP for AI SDRs
description: B2B sales playbook frameworks for AI agents. 10 callable tools: discovery scripts, objection handling, follow-up sequences, 7 closing styles, 3-option pricing framework, EMEA market intelligence (UK/IE/ES/DE/FR/NL/Nordics), cold email templates, call scripts. Built from 10+ years of B2B enterprise sales experience across ad-tech, SaaS, and media. Disclaimer: structured general-best-practice frameworks; not a substitute for tailored sales coaching.
seoTitle: SMB Sales Intelligence MCP Server | AI SDR Playbooks
seoDescription: Enterprise sales playbook frameworks for AI agents. Objection handling, discovery scripts, EMEA intelligence, follow-up sequences. Built from 10+ years of B2B enterprise sales.
